reason: JAX-backed wrappers shipped for all six analytic fields (ToroidalField, PoloidalField, MirrorModel, Dommaschk, Reiman, CircularCoil) + InterpolatedField. Carlson R_F/R_D elliptic helper unblocks CircularCoil. InterpolatedFieldJAX implements cylindrical->Cartesian, nfp/stellsym folding, skip mask, out-of-bounds NaN sentinel. 61 tests pass (40 under SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow).

promotion_validation.command: JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest tests/jax_core/test_elliptic_helper.py tests/jax_core/test_elliptic_item12.py tests/field/test_circular_coil_jax.py tests/field/test_interpolated_field_jax_item15.py tests/field/test_magneticfieldclasses_jax_item15.py -q

SIMSOPT_JAX_TRANSFER_GUARD=disallow JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest tests/jax_core/test_elliptic_helper.py tests/field/test_circular_coil_jax.py tests/field/test_interpolated_field_jax_item15.py -q
